notes: Google Sheets has no row-level push API. Zapier implements all of these as polling. In OpenFn, a cron schedule + a since-cursor (timestamp column or row count) is the typical pattern.

triggers.name: New or Updated Spreadsheet Row
triggers.description: Fires when a new row is added or an existing row is updated.

triggers.name: New Spreadsheet
triggers.description: Fires when a new spreadsheet is created.

output.summary: Drive File resource for the spreadsheet

triggers.name: New Spreadsheet Row
triggers.description: Fires when a new row is added to the bottom of a spreadsheet.

triggers.name: New Worksheet
triggers.description: Fires when a new worksheet is added to a spreadsheet.
